title: Oru Vidha Aasai Lyrics Maari Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Maari Oru Vidha Aasai Varygiradhaa Song Lyrics
Singers(s): Vineeth Sreenivasan
Lyrics: Dhanush

Oru vidha
aasai varugiradhaa.
pudhu vida
bodhai tharugiradhaa
kanavula duet varugiradhaa
duetil foriegn varugiradhaa
idhuravai kutthu paattuku
kuththugal unaku
melodyil pidikkiradhaa.

pidikkaama nadikkaadhey
nadichaalum nadakkaadhey
idhu unna chase panni
adikkaama mudikkaadhey.

Oru vidha
aasai varugiradhaa.
pudhu vida
bodhai tharugiradhaa
kanavula duet varugiradhaa
duetil foriegn varugiradhaa

melodyil pidikkiradhaa.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Vidha Aasai expresses the excitement of pursuing dreams and the joy of life, encapsulating a carefree spirit.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Maari, this song highlights the protagonist's aspirations and adds a lively touch to the narrative.

Who are the artists behind this song?

The song features the talented Vineeth Sreenivasan as the singer, with lyrics by Dhanush and music composed by Anirudh.

When was the song released?

Oru Vidha Aasai was released on June 7, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Vidha Aasai, the protagonist of Maari expresses his vibrant dreams and aspirations through lively lyrics and an infectious melody. The song captures a sense of youthful energy and joy, making it perfect for celebrations and parties. With Anirudh's upbeat composition and Dhanush's playful lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement. This track is a delightful reminder of the carefree spirit of chasing one's dreams.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Vidha Aasai from Maari is a vibrant celebration of dreams and aspirations, perfectly blending Anirudh's catchy tunes with the playful lyrics of Dhanush. This upbeat track captures the essence of youthful exuberance and is sure to get you dancing. Experience the magic of this unique collaboration that brings a fresh vibe to Tamil music!
stanzaMeanings: A certain desire is coming. A new kind of understanding is coming. A duet is coming in dreams, and foreign elements are coming. In this dance, the beats are for you, and you enjoy the melody.
A certain desire is coming. A new kind of understanding is coming.
Looking at the size is nice, and this moment is alive!
The light is shining bright, and the laughter is sweet!
The jasmine fragrance is coming to you from the other side!
The mustache is curling, and the hair is fragrant!
Don't dance without being noticed; even if you dance, don't let it end without chasing you.
A certain desire is coming. A new kind of understanding is coming. A duet is coming in dreams, and foreign elements are coming. In this dance, the beats are for you, and you enjoy the melody.
